heading: Reference to chapter 1803
label: 2231 Reference to chapter 1803
text: Provisions of law relating to facilities for reserve components are set forth in chapter 1803 of this title (beginning with section 18231).
notes: Prior ProvisionsPrior sections 2231 to 2239 were renumbered sections 18231 to 18239 of this title, respectively.
Effective DateSection effective , except as otherwise provided, see , set out as a note under .Dec. 1, 1994section 1691 of Pub. L. 103–337section 10001 of this title
